description_long: This hardware store features a boxy, modern structure with a flat roof and a geometric facade. The exterior is primarily composed of dark and light panels, with a distinctive black-and-white checkered pattern on one side and green accents on the rear and side walls. Large glass windows and double doors dominate the front, providing visibility into the interior and allowing natural light to enter. The building appears to have two main sections, with one slightly recessed from the other, creating a stepped profile. The roof is flat and expansive, suitable for supporting HVAC units or signage. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually striking, making it easily recognizable in an urban environment.
description: A modern, boxy hardware store with a flat roof, geometric black-and-white facade, large glass windows, and green side accents.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main glass entrance doors, large windows, and the checkered black-and-white facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid, dark back wall with minimal features and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the secondary glass entrance, more of the checkered pattern, and the green side wall.
description_view_3: Back-right view showing the plain green wall and the stepped profile of the building's rear.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features two large glass entrances with adjacent windows, a prominent checkered facade, and a stepped building profile. The side and rear walls are solid with green accents, and there are no visible exterior display areas.
